start.speaker: Giant Despair
start.text: You have failed too often to call this a journey. The cell is honest; the road was the lie.
start.text_zh: 你失败得太多，不配称这是什么旅程。这牢房才诚实；那条路才是谎言。

text_variants.text: You faced Apollyon and lived — but that only means more pride for me to break. One locked door can undo a hundred victories.
text_variants.text_zh: 你面对过亚玻伦还活着——可那不过是更多该让我碾碎的骄傲。一道锁住的门，足以抹掉一百场胜利。

text_variants.text: Your friend Faithful burned for his faith at the Fair. Where did it get him? The same silence is waiting for you here.
text_variants.text_zh: 你的朋友忠信在集市上为信仰被焚。那让他得着了什么？同样的沉默，在这里等着你。

choices.text: Believe the accusation, and lie down.
I cannot see the road, but I remember the gate.
choices.text_zh: 我看不见路，但我记得那门。

choices.text: (Take out the Promise.) 'He who promised is faithful.'
choices.text_zh: （取出应许。）「那应许我们的，是信实的。」

deeper.speaker: Giant Despair
deeper.text: Good. Stay down. Many who once walked bravely have rotted in this very cell.
deeper.text_zh: 很好。躺着别动。许多曾勇敢前行的人，都在这间牢房里烂掉了。

choices.text: No. Even here, mercy can reach me. I will search for a way out.
choices.text_zh: 不。即使在这里，怜悯也能寻见我。我要去寻一条出路。

remember.text: A word returns from the Slough, from a stone of promise you once held: the way back is never closed to the one who will be helped. You begin to feel along the cold wall.
remember.text_zh: 一句话从泥潭、从你曾握住的应许之石上回到心头：归途，对肯受帮助的人，从不关闭。你开始沿着冰冷的墙摸索。

text_variants.text: A word returns from the Slough — 'One true step is still obedience. Take it.' Your fingers find something forgotten in your breast pocket.
text_variants.text_zh: 一句话从泥潭回来——「一步真实的顺服，仍是顺服。迈出去。」你的指尖在胸前口袋里摸到了一样被遗忘的东西。

key.text: The Promise warms in your hand like a key long forgotten. Despair's grip loosens. There is a way out of Doubting Castle.
key.text_zh: 那应许在你掌中温热起来，像一把久被遗忘的钥匙。绝望的钳制松开了。怀疑城堡，有路可出。
